---
title: "Página 3 — Brechas Salariales"
subtitle: "EQUILAB · DAT4CCIÓN 2026"
date: today
lang: es
format:
  dashboard:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r librerias}
#| include: false
#| context: setup
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotly)
library(Hmisc)

COLOR_HOMBRES <- "#2166AC"
COLOR_MUJERES <- "#D6604D"
```

```{r cargar-datos}
#| include: false
#| context: setup
df_ocup <- read_parquet("../datos/geih_ocupados_2019_2025.parquet")
glimpse(df_ocup)
```

```{r filtros}
#| include: false
#| context: setup
df_base <- df_ocup |>
  filter(
    condicion_activ == 1,
    edad >= 15, edad <= 99,
    sexo %in% c(1, 2),
    !is.na(ing_total),
    !ing_total %in% c(0, 98, 99)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    sexo_label = if_else(sexo == 1, "Hombres", "Mujeres"),
    niv_edu_label = case_when(
      niv_edu_armon %in% c(1, 2) ~ "Sin educación / Preescolar",
      niv_edu_armon == 3         ~ "Primaria",
      niv_edu_armon == 4         ~ "Secundaria",
      niv_edu_armon == 5         ~ "Media",
      niv_edu_armon == 6         ~ "Técnico / Tecnológico",
      niv_edu_armon == 7         ~ "Universitario",
      niv_edu_armon == 8         ~ "Posgrado",
      TRUE                       ~ "Sin información"
    )
  )
```

Visualizacion 1 - Distribución ingresos mensuales

## Column {height="100%"}

### {width="50%"}

```{r espacio-izq}
#| echo: false
plot_ly() |>
  layout(
    xaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
    yaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    margin = list(t = 0, b = 0, l = 0, r = 0)
  )
```

### {width="50%"}

```{r viz-boxplot}
#| echo: false
# Boxplot vertical: ingresos en eje Y, sexo en eje X — cuartiles ponderados por fex

boxstat_pond <- function(x, w) {
  q   <- wtd.quantile(x, weights = w, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr <- unname(q[3] - q[1])
  list(
    q1     = unname(q[1]),
    median = unname(q[2]),
    q3     = unname(q[3]),
    low    = max(min(x[x >= unname(q[1]) - 1.5 * iqr], na.rm = TRUE), unname(q[1]) - 1.5 * iqr),
    high   = min(max(x[x <= unname(q[3]) + 1.5 * iqr], na.rm = TRUE), unname(q[3]) + 1.5 * iqr)
  )
}

anios <- 2019:2025
pasos <- list()

stats_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(anios)) {
  yr  <- anios[i]
  dat <- df_base |> filter(anio == yr)
  for (sx in c("Hombres", "Mujeres")) {
    d  <- dat |> filter(sexo_label == sx)
    stats_list[[paste(yr, sx)]] <- boxstat_pond(d$ing_total / 1e6, d$fex)
  }
}

fig_box <- plot_ly()

for (i in seq_along(anios)) {
  yr <- anios[i]

  for (sx in c("Hombres", "Mujeres")) {
    bs  <- stats_list[[paste(yr, sx)]]
    col <- if (sx == "Hombres") COLOR_HOMBRES else COLOR_MUJERES

    fig_box <- fig_box |> add_trace(
      type        = "box",
      name        = sx,
      q1          = list(bs$q1),
      median      = list(bs$median),
      q3          = list(bs$q3),
      lowerfence  = list(bs$low),
      upperfence  = list(bs$high),
      x0          = sx,
      marker      = list(color = paste0(col, "99")),
      line        = list(color = col, width = 2),
      fillcolor   = paste0(col, "44"),
      width       = 0.5,
      visible     = (i == 1),
      showlegend  = (i == 1),
      legendgroup = sx
    )
  }

  vis <- rep(FALSE, length(anios) * 2)
  vis[c(2 * i - 1, 2 * i)] <- TRUE

  pasos[[i]] <- list(
    method = "update",
    label  = as.character(yr),
    args   = list(list(visible = vis))
  )
}

fig_box <- fig_box |>
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = "Distribución del ingreso laboral mensual por sexo<br><sup>Cuartiles ponderados por factor de expansión (fex) — GEIH Colombia</sup>",
      font = list(size = 14),
      x    = 0.03
    ),
    xaxis = list(
      title         = "",
      categoryorder = "array",
      categoryarray = c("Hombres", "Mujeres")
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title      = "Ingreso mensual (millones COP)",
      tickprefix = "$",
      ticksuffix = "M",
      zeroline   = FALSE,
      gridcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0.08)"
    ),
    legend  = list(orientation = "h", y = 1.12, x = 0),
    boxmode = "group",
    plot_bgcolor  = "white",
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    sliders = list(list(
      active       = 0,
      currentvalue = list(prefix = "Año: ", font = list(size = 13)),
      steps        = pasos,
      pad          = list(t = 40)
    )),
    margin = list(t = 110, b = 90, l = 80, r = 30)
  )

fig_box
```

```{r calculo-mediana}
#| include: false
#| context: setup
mediana_anual <- df_base |>
  group_by(anio, sexo_label) |>
  summarise(
    mediana_ing = Hmisc::wtd.quantile(ing_total, weights = fex, probs = 0.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

## Column {height="100%"}

### {width="50%"}

Visualización 2 — Brecha salarial porcentual por año

```{r viz-brecha-pct}
# Media ponderada por fex — captura la brecha incluso cuando la mediana se iguala
brecha_anual <- df_base |>
  group_by(anio, sexo_label) |>
  summarise(
    media_pond = weighted.mean(ing_total, w = fex, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = sexo_label, values_from = media_pond) |>
  mutate(
    brecha_pct = (Hombres - Mujeres) / Hombres * 100,
    anio_f     = factor(anio)
  )

p_brecha <- ggplot(brecha_anual, aes(x = anio_f, y = brecha_pct)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#762A83", alpha = 0.8, width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(brecha_pct, 1), "%")),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  annotate("text", x = 3.1, y = max(brecha_anual$brecha_pct, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
           label = "Cambio Marco\nMuestral", hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    title    = "Brecha salarial de género — (Media H − M) / Media H",
    subtitle = "Colombia 2019–2025 (medias ponderadas por fex)",
    x = NULL, y = "Brecha (%)",
    caption  = "Fuente: DANE, GEIH 2019–2025. Cálculos: EQUILAB — DAT4CCIÓN 2026."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

ggplotly(p_brecha)
```
